similarOrganizations.name: Robu.in
similarOrganizations.description:
Robu.in is your one-stop destination for Electronics,Mechanical,DIY, Hobby, RC & Engineering products.
We at Robu, realized the hardships faced by people who had limited access to a variety of products at the right prices with sparse information on how to use them and had no other option than to pay exorbitant prices to import them in the country and thus Robu.in was founded with a vision to eliminate this problem and empower the community by making them available an extensive variety of quality products at the best possible prices.

EasyMech, SmartElex and Orange are the three flagship brands of Robu.in.

 

EasyMech

    ‘EasyMech’ is a brand which intends to provide a series of easy to use & specially designed mechanical products for Engineering, DIY and other purposes.
    This series includes thoughtfully designed mechanical products like arms, brackets, couplings, chassis, wheels, grippers and much more.
    Have a unique mechanical component which you would like to get designed and manufactured? Get in touch with us and we’ll make sure that we offer you a solution.

 

SmartElex

    ‘SmartElex’ is a range of highly reliable & advanced electronic boards and circuits which are designed & manufactured in India.
    They are robust, can be used in multiple applications and competitively priced.
    SmartElex’s ‘Aryabhatta’ 8051 Development Board is a highly popular among enthusiasts who are learning microcontrollers & want to quickly develop embedded projects based on standard 8051 Microcontroller core.



Orange
    ‘Orange’ is a range of heavy duty, robust and reliable LiPo batteries which stand up to the punishing extremes of aerobatic flight and power needs of RC vehicles.
    Each pack is equipped with gold plated connectors. All Orange LiPo battery packs are assembled using IR matched cells.
    Orange also has a range of high quality propellers specially designed for multi copters
    They are light in weight to help improve the air-powered efficiency

similarOrganizations.name: Decathlon
similarOrganizations.description:
We are Decathlon. 
We are sport.
And we believe that sport brings out the best in people, especially those in teams. 

Our teammates are as passionate about people as they are about sport. 
Our values guide our daily actions: Vitality, Generosity, Responsibility, and Authenticity.

We are driven by our purpose: We move people through the wonders of sport. This purpose is shared across the 70+ countries where we are present, in the 80+ sports we support, and through the products we design, engineer, produce, and distribute ourselves. 
Because no matter your age, background, or ability, sport should be a space where everyone grows, connects, and can be themselves.

We love what we do and we dare to take risks. We have the right to fall and the opportunity to learn from it. This is lived every day by our 100,000+ teammates, who are trusted with a clear mission from day one. They take on responsibility early, supported by honest feedback and strong human connections. 

We are constantly working to build a workplace where everyone feels safe, respected and included. A workplace where people are free to show up as their true selves and know they belong.
We take pride in creating products that are accessible while taking responsibility for our environmental impact and long-term commitment to the planet. 

Whether you visit one of our 1,800+ stores or connect with us online, we live by the same customer philosophy: satisfied or satisfied. 

The words of our founder Michel Leclercq still guide us today: "Everyday is a new starting line"

We win as a team.
We grow as a team.

And we celebrate the wins, and the learnings, together.
Are you ready to play?

similarOrganizations.name: QX Global Group
similarOrganizations.description:
QX Global Group is a sector‑led, technology‑enabled Business Process Management partner serving mid‑market organizations across the US, UK, and Ireland. 

We help organizations reduce operating cost, improve efficiency, and scale with confidence by combining sector expertise, process optimization, and pragmatic use of technology and AI.

Our work is built for businesses at inflection points such as growth, consolidation, or first‑time outsourcing, where execution quality and risk management matter as much as cost.

With a global workforce of 3,250+ professionals across 8 countries and delivery centers in India and Colombia, QX supports clients across Real Estate, Hospitality, Public Practice Accounting, Recruitment and Staffing, and Insurance Broking.

We are positioned by Everest Group as a Challenger, reflecting our evolution from task execution to outcome‑driven, sector‑embedded delivery.

QX differentiates itself through sector‑embedded delivery rather than generic horizontal outsourcing, a start small grow big engagement model trusted by mid‑market clients, and technology and AI applied within operational workflows to improve productivity, accuracy, and scalability.

Our structured approach blends people, process, and technology, starting with stabilizing operations, then optimizing platforms and introducing automation and AI where it delivers measurable value, enabling clients to move toward outcome‑based operating models.

QX is a Great Place to Work certified organization and India’s first BSI‑certified, GDPR‑compliant outsourcing provider, with ISO 27001 ISMS, ISO 27701 PIMS, and ISO 9001 QMS certifications across our Indian entities. At QX, inclusivity, integrity, and accountability are foundational for our clients and our people.

Recruitment disclaimer: QX does not charge recruitment fees. All hiring is conducted only via our official website and verified @qxglobalgroup.com email IDs.

name: Legend of Toys
description:
At Legend of Toys, we don’t just make toys - we build legends.
Every RC car, drone, and creation in our lineup comes with attitude, speed, and a story to tell.

Think drift tracks on tabletops, off-road beasts kicking up dust, drones chasing sunsets - that’s the world we’re building. A universe where play isn’t just about passing time, it’s about living a little louder, racing a little faster, and collecting characters that feel larger than life.

We design, manufacture, and deliver everything ourselves because we believe Made in India can mean world-class. With 20-point quality checks, pre-charged batteries, and spare-part support, every box we ship is packed with excitement (and a little bit of chaos).

Legend of Toys isn’t just a company, it’s a movement. A growing crew of kids, teens, hobbyists, and creators who live for the thrill of the drift, the buzz of the engine, and the stories that tie it all together.

Fast. Fun. Fearless. That’s Legend of Toys.

similarOrganizations.name: ZURU Toys
similarOrganizations.description:
ZURU is a disruptive and award-winning company that designs, manufactures and markets innovative toys and consumer products. 

Inspired by kids and imaginative play, ZURU is one of the fastest growing toy companies in the world and is known for their agility, creativity and new-age manufacturing techniques. 

The company that started in New Zealand now employs more than 5,000 staff across 18 offices, produces 600,000 toys a day and distributes to most major retailers in over 120 countries. 

ZURU has delighted millions of families all over the world with brands such as Bunch O Balloons™, X-Shot™, Rainbocorns™, Robo Alive™, Smashers™, 5 Surprise™ and Metal Machines™ as well as through partnerships with entertainment properties, including Nickelodeon, Disney, Universal Studios and DreamWorks. 

With a strong commitment to the community, ZURU supports Captivating International, local China orphanages and also student development programs in Asia and in New Zealand. 

ZURU will continue to pave new ways for kids to play and focuses on reimagining what this looks like every day.

similarOrganizations.name: Simple Energy
similarOrganizations.description:
At Simple Energy, we are driven by a singular mission: to accelerate the world’s transition to sustainable mobility. Our vision is bold yet clear—to create electric scooters that redefine performance, design, and sustainability, setting new standards for the industry.
Meet Simple One 
Unrivaled Range: The Simple One delivers an exceptional range of 248 km, the longest in India. This is not just a number; it’s a testament to the possibilities of innovation.
Revolutionary Storage: With an impressive 30 litres + boot space, our scooter redefines practicality and convenience for every rider.
Timeless Design: Our sharply defined, futuristic aesthetics are not just about appearance—they reflect a deeper commitment to purposeful design.
Ahead of time: With a top speed of 105 kmph, you can race with the wind.
Meet Simple Dot One
Unbeatable Range: With a range of 151 km, you can travel worry-free on the Simple Dot One.
Revolutionary Storage: Space is never an issue as the Simple Dot One has a massive boot space of 35 litres.
Advanced Acceleration: The Simple Dot One electric scooter goes from 0 - 40 kmph in a matter of 2.55 seconds.

Our Values, Our Foundation
Go beyond the dot: We push the boundaries and perfect what's already perfected. This relentless pursuit is how we've achieved the largest range in the market.
Innovation: From technology to design, we continuously push boundaries to lead the EV revolution.
Excellence: Achieving zero-rejection standards in manufacturing and offering an 8-year motor warranty reflects our uncompromising commitment to quality.
At Simple Energy, we’re not just building scooters; we’re building a movement. One that transforms the way we think about mobility—and what’s possible with electric vehicles.

similarOrganizations.name: FirstClub
similarOrganizations.description:
We’re FirstClub!

About Us: Founded in 2024

FirstClub is a new-age startup that’s redefining how people shop across channels, building the next big thing in retail. We’re creating a truly omnichannel platform, combining the speed of quick commerce with the immersive experience of offline stores. But we’re not just about speed—we’re about trust and transparency. Our platform ensures that every product we sell is curated with care, so customers know exactly what they’re buying and can make informed, conscious choices.

Founded by Ayyappan R, former CEO of Cleartrip, Chief Business Officer at Myntra, and SVP at Flipkart, FirstClub is backed by top-tier VCs and angel investors who believe in our vision to transform retail. Ayyappan is an e-commerce veteran known for building several multi-billion-dollar businesses before venturing out to create FirstClub.

We’re starting strong: initially focusing on fruits & vegetables, groceries, dairy, and health products, with plans to expand into categories like beauty, fashion, home, and more. Our mission is to become the go-to platform for high-quality, curated products that balance affordability and premium value.

FirstClub isn’t just another quick commerce player—we’re building a platform of trusted brands. Whether it’s everyday essentials, freshly made goods, or gourmet treats, we’re here to deliver quality, trust, and transparency in everything we do.

We’re currently in 0-to-1 hiring mode, laying the foundation for what’s to come. Every single hire at this stage will play a pivotal role in shaping FirstClub’s future. If you’re someone who’s excited about building from the ground up and creating something extraordinary, we’d love to connect!

Download the app : https://qr-codes.io/tj10KA

similarOrganizations.name: Smartivity
similarOrganizations.description:
Smartivity STEAM toys make learning fun as the creators of tomorrow create their toys from scratch. Our made-in-India toys help the lil’ ones grasp the fundamentals of science as they build, break, experiment, tinker, and learn through play. Ages 3-14 years and beyond!

Smartivity’s DIY toys are thoughtfully crafted to help the builders of tomorrow gain confidence as they build the toys on their own. As they play they experiment with applications of the toy, tinker with designs, and let their imagination take flight through story building.

Our toys run on STEAM, powering the engine of the mind. STEAM as in Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics. When kids have fun they not only learn better but also retain their learning better. Be it pulleys, gravity, or gears, our wide range of unique toys helps children grasp dozens of basic concepts. Learning shouldn’t be a bore or a chore. There’s just so much more.
Smartivity’s mission is to make learning fun and holistic. How much fun? A box full of it! Each Smartivity box comes with a richly illustrated instruction manual, a sheet with parts made of re-engineered pinewood. Our 100% eco-friendly signature wooden pieces are for assembling and building the toy. The kit also contains a learner’s sheet to assist your child to play with the toy in the best way possible. It also explains all the STEAM concepts your child will learn while playing.

With Smartivity, learning can be child’s play!

similarOrganizations.name: Skillmatics
similarOrganizations.description:
Skillmatics is a full stack direct-to-consumer brand that develops innovative educational products, activities and games that build core skills in children through systematic play.

Skillmatics is building a new age business model to disrupt a $100 billion global industry. We sell directly to consumers globally while leveraging India's structural advantages in manufacturing, product design, technology and content creation. We adopt a data driven approach to product development and have built a vertically integrated supply chain that allows us rapidly iterate, launch and scale new products 5X faster than traditional incumbents.

Skillmatics has raised USD 24 Million from marquee investors led by Sequoia Capital and Sofina. Skillmatics has offices in Palo Alto, Dallas and Mumbai. 

Skillmatics has sold 12 million units globally through various e-commerce marketplaces and an international network of 25,000+ retail stores (including Walmart & Target), with a primary focus on the North American market. Our bestselling products (Guess in 10 and Foil Fun) have hit the No 1 Rank in the Toys & Games category on Amazon USA. 

Skillmatics has was awarded the Global SMB of the Year by Amazon and has been featured in the Financial Times List of 500 Fastest Growing Companies for four years in a row (2022-2025).

similarOrganizations.name: GOBOULT
similarOrganizations.description:
We are GOBOULT, India’s fastest-growing consumer-tech brand. 

GOBOULT was born in a 12×12 ft room in 2017. No funding, no playbook, just conviction, caffeine, and an obsession with building world-class tech from India. 

As GOBOULT, we went from zero to industry-shaping: 

India’s #1 rated audio brand in smart hearables (CMR, 2024) 
#2 audio brand by volume (Counterpoint, Q1 2025) 
#3 wearables brand (IDC, 2024) 
3 crore+ products sold — that’s a Boult every 3 seconds
52% YoY growth in TWS while the market shrank 11.3% 
4X revenue growth in 3 years — with zero external funding 
650+ Goboulters designing, engineering, and building in India 
4.1★+ average rating across Amazon & Flipkart

From topping Flipkart & Amazon charts to setting up our own manufacturing unit in Wazirpur, we proved that an Indian bootstrapped brand could take on global giants AND WIN. 

GOBOULT aims to go beyond every milestone: 

From #3 in wearables to #1 across categories 
From 3,000 stores to 30,000+ stores by FY26 
From India’s pride to a global tech contender in USA, EU, SEA, East Asia 
From high-growth to IPO-ready by 2030, targeting ₹2,000 Cr+ scale 
From 15% R&D investment to 30% of revenue reinvested in innovation 
From premium products to flagships with ₹2,000+ ASP

Our new identity is more than design. Its intent in geometry:

 Screwhead → structure, precision, engineering discipline 
Arrow → bold direction, velocity, momentum 

Together, it’s structured inside, swagger outside. 

We’re building tech that doesn’t just keep up with Gen Z, it moves ahead of them. Products that perform like Formula 1 engines but wear like streetwear.
Because in our world, if you’re not going all out, why go at all?

similarOrganizations.name: Primebook India
similarOrganizations.description:
What happens when deep-tech meets the everyday ambitions of the youth? You get Primebook, India’s first Android-based laptop. It’s built to empower the next generation of students, self-learners, creators, coders, and early professionals to learn smarter, work faster, and explore the unlimited possibilities of the web.

A product of Floydwiz Technologies Pvt. Ltd., the deep-tech engineering of Primebook started in 2018 with one mission: to make computing truly accessible to India’s youth. 

Founded by two IIT Delhi alumni, Aman Verma and Chitranshu Mahant, Primebook isn’t just a product line; it’s a growing movement to level the digital playing field.

At the centre of all Primebook laptops lies PrimeOS, our custom, in-house operating system based on Android, purpose-built for laptops. It powers an experience that’s simple and flexible like Android, but powerful like a PC. That means you can get:

- Full-screen Android apps that feel at home on a laptop
- Keyboard + trackpad support and multi-window multitasking
- A dedicated browser and desktop-style file manager
- Over 50,000 apps available via our own Prime App Store
- Cloud PC access to stream full Linux or Windows environments
- In built AI assistant, powered by Gemini, and AI-Powered global search features
- A beginner-friendly offline coding tool called PrimeCoding
- Keymapping support for mobile-first apps and games

We could go on, but you get the idea, right? It’s a simple vision, and it’s gradually turning heads for the right reasons.

We have already bagged: 

- Editor’s Choice: Most Useful Gadget for Students Award from DEVICENEXT
- No.2 Laptop Brand Under ₹20K from Flipkart
- Gold Winner – Best Brand Building Campaign (Vivid) at Flipkart Ads Jury Awards
- Innovative & Cost-Effective Computing Company of the Year at the Great Indian Entrepreneurship, Business, and Startup Awards
- Top 500 SMEs of the Year  by India 5000

But honestly? We’re just getting started.

similarOrganizations.name: Custom Engineered Wheels
similarOrganizations.description:
For nearly 50 years, Custom Engineered Wheels (CEW®) has been the market leader in Plastic Injection Molding: Custom and Standard Wheels plus a wide variety of plastic components and parts.  

We operate in two locations, our HQ and main operations facility located in Baldwyn Mississippi, with our second location in Reynosa, Mexico.  Both facilities have ISO 9001:2015 certification, combining for nearly 250,000 sq feet of manufacturing space including 33 presses ranging from 1,250 tons to 100 tons.

We go to market under four operating groups.  Our Industrial Wheels Group offers OEMs the industry’s most comprehensive selection of standard and custom wheels designed to meet the demanding requirements of all commercial and industrial applications including lawn and garden, material handling, and recycling.  Our Medical Mobility Group has been a leader in medical mobility solutions since 1988. We were pioneers in introducing the first wheelchair wheel with flat-free technology, and we continue to push boundaries with our innovative products.  Our Cycle Technology Group is a leading manufacturer with six decades of experience in specialty wheels for the bicycle industry.  This group offers unparalleled expertise and cutting-edge technology to meet the evolving needs of the cycling market.  Our Advanced Manufacturing Group is a leading provider of custom injection molded thermoplastic components and tool transfers, specializing in medium to high-volume production. 

Collectively, these four groups operate under some of the industry’s most iconic and well-known brands, including X-Core®, Shox®. Shox-Air®, Aero-Flex®, Skyway®, and TuffWheel®.

similarOrganizations.name: Rotobox Wheels
similarOrganizations.description:
THAT’S HOW WE ROLL
Since the very first day Rotobox strives to take the performance of carbon fiber wheels to a new level. By continuously pushing the boundaries of creative engineering our products set industry standards for lightness, stiffness, design and premium quality. Whether on the track or on the road – the racing DNA of the Rotobox team is not only reflected in our wheels, but can be felt with every meter driven.

RACERS KNOW, WHAT RACERS NEED.
How to make the lightest and strongest wheel on the world? That’s the question motorcycling racer, research & development engineer and Rotobox CEO Gregor Bizjak asked himself more than a decade ago. The answer was a revolutionary 3 component- carbon-epoxy-steel-composite and a newly developed production procedure, which paved the way for a new generation of high performance automotive and motorcycle wheels by Rotobox.

similarOrganizations.name: Shiprocket
similarOrganizations.description:
Shiprocket is India’s largest eCommerce enablement platform providing digital retailers an end-to-end customer experience platform. The platform which is creating an operating system for direct commerce enables shipping, fulfillment, customer communication and marketing tools as well as providers for SMEs, D2C retailers, and social commerce retailers in India. With 25+ courier partners on board, the brand enables pan-India as well as international shipping deliveries. Its shipping solutions are available across 24,000+ pin codes within India and 220 countries worldwide.

Launched in 2017, Shiprocket is on a mission to create a seamless logistics data platform that connects retailers, carriers, and consumers across national and international locations. Shiprocket provides a technology stack to help retailers integrate their shopping websites on Shopify, Magento, Woocommerce, Zoho, or others with the platform’s multi-carrier API to manage orders, print shipping labels, and avail tracking information from multiple providers including managing Cash on Delivery (COD) orders and payment reconciliation. Shiprocket also offers state-of-the-art fulfillment solutions with more than 35+ warehouses located across India. The technology stack provides a robust post-purchase experience to consumers, resulting in higher engagement and lower RTO (failed deliveries).

Today, Shiprocket is the platform behind 2.5 lakh plus sellers who generate a GMV of more than $2.5B annually. The platform delivers packets to more than 70M consumers annually and is growing transactions 2.5-3X year on year.

similarOrganizations.name: Zomato
similarOrganizations.description:
Zomato’s mission statement is “better food for more people.” Since our inception in 2010, we have grown tremendously, both in scope and scale - and emerged as India’s most trusted brand during the pandemic, along with being one of the largest hyperlocal delivery networks in the country.

Today, Zomato represents a wide range of cultures through its diversified 5000+ team members, 3.5 lakh+ delivery partners, and our biggest collective of the finest restaurant partners. We are grateful that our business is able to provide upward social and economic movement for millions of households – of our delivery partners, as well as restaurant staff. We think of all of us as one big family!

Our passion is driven by purpose and we take immense pride in our initiative ‘Feeding India’, one of India’s largest not-for-profits working to ensure that nobody in India goes to bed hungry. As of now, Feeding India provides over 150,000 nutritious meals to the underprivileged every day.

In April 2020, Feeding India ran one of the largest food distribution drives in the world during the first wave of COVID, and distributed 78 million meals to daily wagers across the length and breadth of the country.

During the second wave of COVID-19, Feeding India was again the first to act. We were able to source over 9,000 oxygen concentrators and distributed them for free to government hospitals across the country. This helped save millions of lives during one of the worst humanitarian crises faced by India in the recent times.

We’re innovating hard to make last-mile delivery carbon neutral, to eliminate the use of plastic packaging, create meaningful opportunities in the gig economy, and to feed our country’s ever-growing appetite for high-quality, affordable, and hygienic food, one delivery at a time!

similarOrganizations.name: Flipkart
similarOrganizations.description:
At Flipkart, we're driven by our purpose of empowering every Indian's dream by delivering value through innovation in technology and commerce. With a customer base of over 350 million, product coverage of over 150 million across 80+ categories, a focus on generating direct and indirect employment and a commitment to empowering generations of entrepreneurs and MSMEs, all driven by a sustainable growth strategy – Flipkart is maximising for customers, stakeholders, and the planet at large!

At Flipkart, our promise to every Flipster is - getting an opportunity to leave a mark and create their own legacy, the freedom to experiment, learn and grow, work with the industry’s brightest minds as part of a diverse team and we will extend our culture of care to them to ensure that they can focus on doing their best work.
 
Driven by audacity, bias for action, customer first, integrity and inclusion – Flipsters have pioneered solutions that have transformed digital commerce in India. From the industry-first introduction of cash-on-delivery in 2010 to the launch of voice search and multiple vernacular interfaces in 2021 that have made e-commerce a very inclusive experience, Flipkart continues the exciting journey of solving for the Indian customer.
 
We understand that your own aspirations and journeys are unique. So you choose what you want to maximise, and we provide you the platform for it - because when you maximise, we maximise.  
 
Flipkart is a part of the Walmart-owned Flipkart Group, which also includes group companies Flipkart Wholesale, Flipkart Health+, Cleartrip, and Myntra.

Get in touch with our experts for support with your orders here: https://www.flipkart.com/helpcentre

similarOrganizations.name: Myntra
similarOrganizations.description:
At Myntra, we build lifestyle experiences used by millions of people across India.

Over the years, Myntra has grown from a fashion destination into one of India’s leading lifestyle platforms with over 13,000 brands across fashion, beauty, and home decor. This growth is backed by strong business fundamentals, with Myntra sustaining its positive EBITDA for the second consecutive year in FY25. Today, teams across product, engineering, design, marketing, data science, category, and operations work together to solve how India discovers, shops, and engages online.

Across experiences like M-Now, AI Stylist, Myntra FWD, and creator led commerce, our teams are building around personalization, speed, discovery, and convenience. Whether it’s helping customers discover trends faster, making shopping more intuitive, enabling quicker deliveries, or creating more content led experiences, we’re constantly working on how fashion, lifestyle, and beauty are explored and shopped online in India.

Behind all of this are the people who make Myntra, Myntra.

Our Myntraites are engineers, analysts, designers, creators, marketers, stylists, operators, and problem solvers who care about doing meaningful work at scale. We value ownership, curiosity, collaboration, and people who are willing to learn fast and build thoughtfully.

Our EVP, Empowering You to Fashion The Future, reflects how we work at Myntra with a passion for fashion, the freedom to pave your way, and the mindset to innovate and lead.

Whether you’re solving complex tech challenges, shaping customer experiences, building brands, or improving how millions shop online, there’s always something meaningful to work on at Myntra.

Join the team: https://jobs.myntra.com/home
(Please note: This is our only official careers page for all available opportunities.)

Be The Trend. Be Myntra.

similarOrganizations.name: Delhivery
similarOrganizations.description:
Delhivery is India’s largest fully-integrated logistics services provider. With a nationwide network spanning over 18,850 pin codes, the company offers a comprehensive range of logistics solutions — including express parcel transportation, partial-truckload (PTL) and full-truckload (FTL) freight, International, supply chain solutions, National & local courier services and technology-enabled logistics. 

Comprehensive Solutions for Every Need
➡️Express Parcel: Send shipments across India, including heavy goods, with value-added services like real-time tracking, NDR Management, WhatsApp based updates, RTO, Protect
➡️Delivery App: All-in-one courier service that lets you send anything within the city or anywhere in India
➡️Rapid: A sub-2-hour delivery service helping brands offer faster deliveries and a better customer experience
➡️Supply Chain Solutions: Store and manage inventory at optimized locations across India, fulfilling orders for both B2B and B2C channels with precision.
➡️Partial Truckload (PTL):Leverage India’s large PTL network for door-to-door or hub-to-hub delivery with multimodal freight and smart dashboards.
➡️Full Truckload (FTL): Handle high-volume shipments with speed and efficiency through our professional network of truckload partners and our own fleet.
➡️International: Reach 220+ countries with door-to-door delivery, end-to-end tracking, and multiple shipping speeds-built for SMEs, D2C brands, and exporters looking to ship
➡️TransportOne: Delhivery’s AI‑powered TMS that gives enterprises end‑to‑end optimization, from intelligent sourcing and load stacking to agentic ePOD and automated billing

Our Impact at Scale
✔️4 Billion+ parcels shipped since inception
✔️Coverage of 99.5% of India’s population
✔️Trusted by 48,000+ businesses
✔️Shipped over 4.7 Million tonnes of freight
✔️Managing 22.05 Million+ sqft of logistics infrastructure
Start shipping: https://one.delhivery.com/register
Download Delhivery Direct App: https://appdelhivery.go.link/5YuVn

3D Animations: Crafting visually stunning and immersive animations that bring stories to life. 🎥

3D Product Design: Creating realistic and attractive product visuals. 🛍️

similarOrganizations.name: Meesho
similarOrganizations.description:
Meesho is India’s e-commerce marketplace, on a mission to democratise internet commerce. Our multi-sided technology platform connects four key stakeholders — consumers, sellers, logistics partners, and content creators — to power inclusive growth at scale. 

We enable individuals and small businesses to sell online with ease, offering access to a wide customer base, integrated logistics, payment solutions, and platform support. For customers, Meesho offers a broad and affordable selection, tailored for diverse needs across Bharat. We also empower creators to build commerce-driven content that drives discovery and engagement.
Our logistics operations are powered by Valmo, Meesho’s asset-light logistics platform that works entirely through partner-led infrastructure to ensure cost-efficient and scalable deliveries.
